organization.fullName: National Institute of Cardiology, Laranjeiras, Brazil

identificationModule.briefTitle: Effect of Nitrate Supplementation on Blood Pressure and Microvascular Function of Resistant Hypertensive Patients
identificationModule.officialTitle: Effect of Nitrate Supplementation on Blood Pressure and Systemic Microvascular Function of Resistant Hypertensive Patients

responsibleParty.investigatorAffiliation: National Institute of Cardiology, Laranjeiras, Brazil

leadSponsor.name: National Institute of Cardiology, Laranjeiras, Brazil

descriptionModule.briefSummary: Arterial hypertension (AH) has been identified as an important public health problem and considered a new epidemic with high mortality and morbidity. High blood pressure (BP) levels increase the chances of coronary artery disease (CAD), heart failure (HF), stroke, chronic renal failure (CRF) and death. Beetroot powder may be an easier way to increase the availability of nitric oxide and consequently vasodilation in these patients. However, studies are needed to evaluate its benefits in patients with AH.

designInfo.interventionModelDescription: Treatment with beetroot extract powder - nutritional supplementation

armGroups.label: Placebo
armGroups.description: The placebo group will be administered as a colored and flavored isocaloric supplement composed of maltodextrin.

armGroups.label: Beetroot extract
armGroups.description: Beetroot extract powder supplementation with 400mg of nitrate per dose in the amount of 10g per day orally will be used in the group.

interventions.name: Beetroot extract
interventions.description: Beetroot extract powder supplementation with 400mg of nitrate per dose in the amount of 10g per day orally will be used in the group.

interventions.name: Placebo
interventions.description: The placebo will be administered as a colored and flavored isocaloric supplement composed of maltodextrin.

primaryOutcomes.description: Evaluation using Ambulatory Blood Pressure Monitoring: systolic, diastolic and mean arterial pressures

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Resistant hypertension, with a diagnosis described in the medical record, without changing medications or increasing doses in the last 30 days.

Exclusion Criteria:

* neoplasms
* heart failure
* use of medications with nitrate in their formula
* patients undergoing renal denervation
